name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve MPLP
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Execute '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 🖼️ Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🔧 Environment

Please complete the following information:

- **MPLP Version**: [e.g., 1.1.0]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g., 18.17.0]
- **npm Version**: [e.g., 9.6.7]
- **Operating System**: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 13.0]
- **Affected Module**: [e.g., Context, Plan, Role, etc.]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

### Error Logs

```
Paste any relevant error logs here
```

### Configuration

```typescript
// Paste any relevant configuration here
```

## 🔍 Possible Solution

If you have suggestions on how to fix the bug, please describe them here.

## 📚 Related Issues

- Link to any related issues or pull requests

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for similar issues before creating this one
- [ ] I have provided all the required information above
- [ ] I have tested this with the latest version of MPLP
- [ ] I have included error logs and relevant code snippets
